category.scope_note: Filtering facepiece respirator (FFP / N95-type) compliance comparison: China domestic (GB 2626 KN95 / GB 19083) to the Philippine market (DOLE OSH framework, PNS respirator standards, BPS where applicable, FDA for medical masks, in-country importer).

title.en: China-to-Philippines PPE Respirator (Mask) Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国口罩呼吸器进入菲律宾：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國口罩呼吸器進入菲律賓：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of Chinese PPE respirator (KN95 / GB 2626 / GB 19083) documentation against Philippine requirements: the DOLE (Department of Labor and Employment) occupational safety and health framework for respiratory protection at work, PNS (Philippine National Standards) respirator standards, the Bureau of Philippine Standards (BPS) under DTI where a technical regulation applies, the FDA for medical / surgical masks, and the in-country importer obligation.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国PPE呼吸器（KN95/GB 2626/GB 19083）文件与菲律宾要求对照，涵盖劳工就业部（DOLE）针对工作场所呼吸防护的职业安全与健康（OSH）框架、菲律宾国家标准（PNS）呼吸器标准、DTI下属菲律宾标准局（BPS）在适用技术法规时的角色、食品药品监督管理局（FDA）对医用/外科口罩的监管，以及在地进口商义务。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國PPE呼吸器（KN95/GB 2626/GB 19083）文件與菲律賓要求對照，涵蓋勞工就業部（DOLE）針對工作場所呼吸防護的職業安全與健康（OSH）框架、菲律賓國家標準（PNS）呼吸器標準、DTI下屬菲律賓標準局（BPS）在適用技術法規時的角色、食品藥品監督管理局（FDA）對醫用/外科口罩的監管，以及在地進口商義務。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, conformity assessment, customs determination, or market-access approval. Exporters, importers, and distributors should verify current Philippine law, PNS standards, BPS technical regulations, DOLE OSH rules, and FDA medical device requirements with qualified regulatory professionals before shipment or placing products on the market. The PPE-vs-medical mask boundary described herein requires case-by-case legal and regulatory analysis.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、合格评定、海关裁定或市场准入批准。出口商、进口商及分销商在出货或投放市场前，应与合格的法规专业人士核验现行菲律宾法律、PNS标准、BPS技术法规、DOLE的OSH规则及FDA医疗器械要求。本文所述的PPE与医用口罩界定需要逐案进行法律及法规分析。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、合格評定、海關裁定或市場准入批准。出口商、進口商及分銷商在出貨或投放市場前，應與合格的法規專業人士核驗現行菲律賓法律、PNS標準、BPS技術法規、DOLE的OSH規則及FDA醫療器械要求。本文所述的PPE與醫用口罩界定需要逐案進行法律及法規分析。

answer_first.en: Respiratory protective equipment in the Philippines is governed primarily by the DOLE occupational safety and health framework (RA 11058 and DOLE Department Order 198-18), which requires employers to provide PPE that meets recognised standards. Respirator products reference Philippine National Standards (PNS) and, where a mandatory technical regulation exists, BPS (DTI) certification (PS licence for local manufacture or ICC for imports). Medical and surgical masks are regulated separately by the FDA as medical devices, not as occupational PPE. Chinese KN95 (GB 2626) and GB 19083 test reports are not automatically recognised; an in-country importer and conformity to the applicable Philippine standard or technical regulation are required.
answer_first.zh: 菲律宾的呼吸防护装备主要受DOLE职业安全与健康框架（RA 11058及DOLE部令198-18）约束，该框架要求雇主提供符合公认标准的PPE。呼吸器产品参照菲律宾国家标准（PNS）；在存在强制技术法规时，须取得BPS（DTI）认证（本地制造的PS许可证或进口的ICC）。医用及外科口罩由FDA作为医疗器械单独监管，而非作为职业PPE。中国KN95（GB 2626）及GB 19083检测报告不会被自动认可；须有在地进口商，并须符合适用的菲律宾标准或技术法规。
answer_first.zht: 菲律賓的呼吸防護裝備主要受DOLE職業安全與健康框架（RA 11058及DOLE部令198-18）約束，該框架要求僱主提供符合公認標準的PPE。呼吸器產品參照菲律賓國家標準（PNS）；在存在強制技術法規時，須取得BPS（DTI）認證（本地製造的PS許可證或進口的ICC）。醫用及外科口罩由FDA作為醫療器械單獨監管，而非作為職業PPE。中國KN95（GB 2626）及GB 19083檢測報告不會被自動認可；須有在地進口商，並須符合適用的菲律賓標準或技術法規。

editorial_controls.review_cycle: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, and verification flag; named human review required before human_reviewed can be set true.
editorial_controls.change_policy: Official regulator, standards body, or primary legal source preferred. Philippine sources: DOLE (dole.gov.ph), BPS/DTI (bps.dti.gov.ph), FDA (fda.gov.ph), and Official Gazette for statutes. Local PDFs are not accepted in place of primary URLs.
